product: CloudSync Pro — a business cloud storage solution
opening: Hi, this is Alex from CloudSync. We help businesses reduce storage costs by up to 40%. Do you have 2 minutes to hear how?

objection_responses.too expensive: I understand cost is a concern. Most of our clients actually save money within the first 3 months due to reduced IT overhead.
objection_responses.not interested: I completely understand. Can I ask what your current storage solution looks like? We might have something more relevant.
objection_responses.already have a solution: That's great to hear. Many of our clients switched from similar solutions after seeing our security and speed benchmarks.
objection_responses.no time: No problem at all. Can I send you a one-page summary to look at when convenient?
objection_responses.default: That's a fair point. Let me address that — our clients typically see results within 30 days with zero migration hassle.

closing: Based on what you've shared, I think CloudSync could genuinely help. Would you be open to a free 15-minute demo this week?
